subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and that He Who hath come is verily the One promised by My tongue and inscribed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی انه لهو الموعود من لسانی و المسطور من
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
